scripts.install:dotconfig: mkdir -p "$HOME/Library/Application Support/Code/User" "$HOME/Library/Application Support/Cursor/User" && ln -sfn "$(pwd)/settings.json" "$HOME/Library/Application Support/Code/User/settings.json" && ln -sfn "$(pwd)/keybindings.json" "$HOME/Library/Application Support/Code/User/keybindings.json" && ln -sfn "$(pwd)/tasks.json" "$HOME/Library/Application Support/Code/User/tasks.json" && ln -sfn "$(pwd)/settings.json" "$HOME/Library/Application Support/Cursor/User/settings.json" && ln -sfn "$(pwd)/keybindings.json" "$HOME/Library/Application Support/Cursor/User/keybindings.json" && ln -sfn "$(pwd)/tasks.json" "$HOME/Library/Application Support/Cursor/User/tasks.json"
